---
title: "scRNA-seq example figures — ATGC services page"
author: "ATGC / Hagay Ladany"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      dev = "svglite", fig.path = "figs/")
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(svglite)
library(dplyr)
library(ggrepel)
set.seed(7)
```

Synthetic / representative data only. Mirrors a real mouse-testis 10x dataset
(8 cell types) so the UMAP and marker-gene heatmap on `index.html` look like
genuine Seurat/pheatmap report figures without exposing project data. Both
figures share one cell-type palette so the two panels are colour-consistent.

```{r palette}
ct_levels <- c("Stroma","Sertoli","Peritubular Myoid","Germ",
               "Endothelial","Macrophage","Leydig","Innate Lymph")
# One palette used by BOTH the UMAP and the heatmap (side-by-side consistency).
pal <- c("Stroma"="#e82281","Sertoli"="#b388d9","Peritubular Myoid"="#289de0",
         "Germ"="#e0a022","Endothelial"="#e8615a","Macrophage"="#00a3b8",
         "Leydig"="#2bb673","Innate Lymph"="#9ccc5a")
```

```{r umap, fig.width=6.4, fig.height=5.2}
# Lobe layout / proportions mirror the real annotated UMAP. Each cluster is a
# bounded, centre-dense disk (not a broad Gaussian) so it reads as a distinct,
# solid island the way a real Seurat UMAP does. R = disk radius, ax/ay = aspect.
lobes <- data.frame(
  ct = ct_levels,
  cx = c(-6.5, 6.8, -6.2, 5.6, -0.6, -11.0,  0.6, 10.8),
  cy = c( 2.8,-4.8, -6.2, 5.2,  8.2,   6.8, -4.2,  1.8),
  R  = c( 3.2, 3.0,  2.7, 3.0,  1.8,   1.6,  1.1,  1.0),
  ax = c( 0.80,1.05, 1.15,0.95, 1.05,  1.05, 1.00, 1.00),
  ay = c( 1.30,1.00, 0.88,1.20, 0.95,  0.85, 1.00, 1.00),
  rot= c( 0.15,0.05, 0.00,-0.30, 0.10,-0.10, 0.00, 0.00),
  n  = c( 640, 572,  567, 541, 122,   99,    31,   29)
)

pts <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(lobes)), function(i){
  r   <- lobes[i, ]
  ang <- runif(r$n, 0, 2*pi)
  rad <- (runif(r$n)^0.6) * r$R                 # centre-dense, hard outer edge
  ex  <- rad*cos(ang)*r$ax + rnorm(r$n)*0.13*r$R  # mild fuzz on the boundary
  ey  <- rad*sin(ang)*r$ay + rnorm(r$n)*0.13*r$R
  co  <- cos(r$rot); si <- sin(r$rot)
  data.frame(UMAP_1 = r$cx + ex*co - ey*si,
             UMAP_2 = r$cy + ex*si + ey*co,
             ct = r$ct)
}))
pts$ct <- factor(pts$ct, levels = ct_levels)

cent <- pts %>% group_by(ct) %>%
  summarise(UMAP_1 = median(UMAP_1), UMAP_2 = median(UMAP_2), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(pts, aes(UMAP_1, UMAP_2, colour = ct)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7, alpha = 0.85, stroke = 0) +
  geom_text_repel(data = cent, aes(label = ct), colour = "#22323f",
                  size = 3.4, fontface = "bold", seed = 7,
                  bg.color = "white", bg.r = 0.12, box.padding = 0.1,
                  min.segment.length = 0.4, segment.color = "#9aa7b0") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = pal, name = NULL) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1))) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.height = unit(13, "pt"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "#6b7a86"),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "#42525e"),
        panel.grid = element_blank())
```

```{r marker-table}
markers <- list(
  "Stroma"            = c("Dcn","Pdgfra","Col1a1","Inha"),
  "Sertoli"           = c("Sox9","Clu","Rhox8","Ctsl"),
  "Peritubular Myoid" = c("Acta2","Myh11","Tagln"),
  "Germ"              = c("Dazl","Stra8","Zbtb16","Uchl1"),
  "Endothelial"       = c("Pecam1","Cd34","Flt1"),
  "Macrophage"        = c("Lyz2","Cd68","C1qa"),
  "Leydig"            = c("Cyp11a1","Star","Hsd3b1"),
  "Innate Lymph"      = c("Igkc","Ighm","Nkg7")
)
gene_ct <- unlist(lapply(names(markers), function(ct)
  setNames(rep(ct, length(markers[[ct]])), markers[[ct]])))
genes <- names(gene_ct)
```

```{r build-matrix}
adjacent <- list("Stroma"="Peritubular Myoid","Peritubular Myoid"="Stroma",
  "Sertoli"="Germ","Germ"="Sertoli","Endothelial"="Stroma",
  "Macrophage"="Innate Lymph","Innate Lymph"="Macrophage","Leydig"="Stroma")
M <- matrix(0, length(genes), length(ct_levels), dimnames = list(genes, ct_levels))
for (g in genes) {
  own  <- gene_ct[[g]]
  base <- runif(length(ct_levels), 0.05, 0.45)
  base[match(own, ct_levels)] <- runif(1, 2.6, 3.6)
  adj  <- adjacent[[own]]
  if (!is.null(adj)) base[match(adj, ct_levels)] <- runif(1, 0.8, 1.4)
  M[g, ] <- base
}
```

```{r heatmap, fig.width=6.0, fig.height=6.6}
ann_row <- data.frame(`Cell type` = factor(gene_ct[genes], levels = ct_levels),
                      check.names = FALSE)
rownames(ann_row) <- genes
heat_cols <- colorRampPalette(c("#2166ac","#4393c3","#f7f7f7",
                                "#d6604d","#b2182b"))(101)
pheatmap(M,
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_cols = FALSE,
         color = heat_cols,
         breaks = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 102),
         annotation_row = ann_row,
         annotation_colors = list(`Cell type` = pal),
         annotation_names_row = FALSE,
         annotation_legend = FALSE,
         gaps_row = head(cumsum(lengths(markers)), -1),
         border_color = "#ffffff",
         cellwidth = 24, cellheight = 14,
         fontsize = 10, fontsize_row = 9, fontsize_col = 10,
         angle_col = 45, legend = TRUE)
```
